content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with ~INR 14k of headroom — effectively maxed out. Several existing positions showed strong intraday moves (TORNTPOWER +5.9%, PNBHOUSING +11%, NESTLEIND +9.6%, AUBANK +5.8%) that warrant SL protection. All positions were entered without proper SL/target per the 0.00 shown — must remediate. No new entries today given hysteresis rule: >60% deployed, near-flat P&L, and several binary earnings events approaching (AUBANK 27-Apr, GRANULES 29-Apr, ADANIPOWER 29-Apr).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print strong (+35% PAT YoY, GNPA improved to 1.45%). Stock is consolidating after 20-Apr rally. Setting SL at 74 (~5.6% below entry, just below 20-day VWAP zone) and target 88 (~8% above entry, gives 1:1.5 RR). Thesis: PSB rerating + consolidation theme intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 960.00,
      "new_target": 1120.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (+19% PAT, GNPA <1% first time). Stock up 11% today to Rs 1006. Trailing SL to 960 (below today's low 981 and prior swing) locks breakeven+. Target 1120 near 52w high aligns with analyst TP Rs 1,143. RR: ~2.5x reward vs risk from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. Gold in consolidation after record highs. SL 119 (~5% below entry) respects 50-DMA zone, target 135 reflects continued safe-haven/INR weakness thesis. Hold as portfolio hedge vs equity beta."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up 5.9% to fresh 52w high Rs 1700. Trailing SL to 1620 (below today's low 1645 and recent swing, locks breakeven+). Target 1850 reflects analyst TP Rs 2000 with buffer. Power sector momentum intact; Q4 results 13-May could be binary event — will reassess pre-event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+27% PAT, double-digit volume growth). Stock at fresh 52w high Rs 1409. SL 1360 (~3.7% below entry, just below today's low 1382). Target 1520 (~7.5% upside) captures defensive FMCG continuation. RR ~2x."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Best banking performer today +5.8% to fresh 52w high. Strong provisional Q4 (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). Universal bank scarcity premium after Ujjivan rejection. SL 1010 (below today's low 1035 and near breakeven). Target 1150 (avg analyst TP 978 to high 1175). Q4 audited results 27-Apr — binary event; will revisit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "new_target": 750.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high Rs 680 with 3.7x volume. Q4 results 29-Apr is binary — tight SL 650 (~4.5% below entry) protects. Target 750 aligns with MOFSL/YES TP. Will likely exit or reassess before earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive breaking out +6.2% today. Q4 results 30-Apr. SL 2280 (~3.9% below entry) protects; target 2520 at mid-analyst TP band. Ride into results with tight risk control."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Base-on-base breakout, ESG upgrade, nuclear MoU catalyst. SL 388 (~4% below entry, below 20-DMA 378 cushion). Target 435 near 52w high aligns with consensus TP 400-440. Solid dividend cushion."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Power cluster momentum, but shooting star candle on 20-Apr at highs and Q4 results 29-Apr (Q3 PAT was -18.9% YoY). Tight SL 202 (~5.6% below entry, near today's low 212 with cushion). Target 235. Will likely exit pre-earnings given red flag and extended rally."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Establish SL where none exists. Thesis intact post-Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 960.00,
      "reasoning": "Up 11% today. Lock breakeven+, let winner run toward 1120."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; maintain with protective SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock breakeven after +5.9% move to 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive breakout post Q4 beat; SL just below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "reasoning": "Approaching binary Q4 event 27-Apr; lock near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary Q4 event 29-Apr; tight SL to protect entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "reasoning": "Ride FMCG breakout into 30-Apr results with tight risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Establish SL below 20-DMA cushion; ride base-on-base breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Shooting star at highs + Q4 risk; tight SL. Likely exit pre-29-Apr."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PIRAMALFIN: ignoring — bearish MACD crossover, director resignation, heavy NCD issuance = structural overhang despite today's pop. DRREDDY: avoid — Brazil ANVISA rejection + MS estimate cut, pharma underperformer. AUROPHARMA: buyback record date already passed (17-Apr), no edge. DEEPAKNTR: decelerating earnings + GST adverse order; avoid chasing gap-up. ELECON: 96% PAT drop on impairment — avoid despite price strength. DATAPATTNS/CESC/IEX: no headroom for new entries. INFY/HCLTECH: IT sector weak, avoid until earnings settle. Will revisit pharma/IT/chemicals on next pulse with fresh capital.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — at the ceiling. 10 open CNC positions across PSU bank, HFC, gold, power (2x — TORNTPOWER+ADANIPOWER+NTPC = 3 names in power cluster = cluster-risk watch!), FMCG (2x), private bank, pharma. Power cluster exposure: TORNTPOWER (~6.1%) + ADANIPOWER (~4.9%) + NTPC (~5.0%) = ~16% of capital in one theme — at the soft limit, NO MORE power additions. Multiple binary earnings events cluster 27-Apr to 30-Apr (AUBANK, ADANIPOWER, GRANULES, HINDUNILVR) — next 2-3 sessions focus must be pre-earnings risk reduction, not new entries. All SLs now established — priority #1 capital preservation met. Hysteresis rule triggered: no new BUYs today."
}
